reviews.text: Look no further for your event photography needs. Benjamin went above and beyond to truly capture our organization's annual convention, and crushed every level of expectations I had. Not only did he demonstrate attention to detail and care for our vision, but found opportunities to enhance our plans and was extremely easy to work with. I'm looking forward to more opportunities to work with Benjamin in the future!

I highly recommend Benjamin to photograph your next event.  He recently photographed my wedding in September 2022 at Boettcher Mansion.  Everyone who sees my photos says “Wow, you had a fairytale wedding.”  And I have to thank Benjamin for being an artist with the camera.  He captured all the most beautiful moments, in just the perfect lighting, and had ideas I never would have thought of, but which made my wedding photos turn out amazing.  His engineering skills were evident, his attention to detail precise, and his experience working big events - with lots of people - extremely helpful.  Benjamin is a true professional, and an excellent communicator.  He made everything flow so easily, I didn’t have to worry about a thing.  But most importantly, my wedding pictures will be proudly remembered for many years to come.  Hire Benjamin for your next event.  You will be thankful you did!

We worked with Alive Studios as our wedding photographer.  And our wedding photos came out SO good.  We are so happy to have these photos to treasure for the rest of our lives.

From the planning phase to the day of to the editing phase, Benjamin was a joy to work with.  He is both professional and relaxed and kept the whole process fun and stress-free.

Highly recommended!

I had the pleasure of having my very first "head-shot" taken by Benjamin at Alive Photography.  Not only did he make me feel comfortable, it was a fun and productive session. He was able to capture  my personality and the essence of who I am by finding the right expression and positioning.  Professional, easy to find, able to accommodate my schedule, kind, creative and reasonably priced!

I'm definitely a reluctant model.  Needing shots for my website was comparable to making an appointment at the dentist's office. Benjamin worked efficiently, with care and humor, creating not only an experience that was enjoyable, but results that were way beyond my expectations. Now I'm trying to figure out when I might need a photo shoot again! Thanks Benjamin!
